message:
feat(wezterm): WeztermInterface get_pane_with_cx + get_text_with_cx (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Extends the trait-level Cx-first migration started in tick 27. Two
more default methods on `WeztermInterface` with overrides on
`WeztermClient`.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/wezterm.rs (+57 src)

   a. `WeztermInterface::get_pane_with_cx` default method.

      Delegates to `get_pane(pane_id)` in the default impl.
      `WeztermClient` override routes to
      `WeztermClient::get_pane_with_cx(cx, pane_id)` (from tick 20)
      which delegates to `list_panes_with_cx(cx)` on the
      Cx-aware backend path.

   b. `WeztermInterface::get_text_with_cx` default method.

      Delegates to `get_text(pane_id, escapes)` in the default impl.
      `WeztermClient` override routes to
      `WeztermClient::get_text_with_cx(cx, pane_id, escapes)` (from
      tick 22) which threads cx through
      `MuxPool::get_pane_render_changes_with_cx` plus
      `MuxPool::get_lines_with_cx` per chunk on the mux-pool fast
      path.

   All other impls (Arc<dyn WeztermInterface>, UnifiedClient,
   MockWezterm, FailingMockWezterm) get the default via trait
   default — zero code changes needed. Strictly additive.

Impact: trait-level Cx-first migration now covers the three most
common pane read paths on WeztermInterface: list_panes (tick 27),
get_pane (this commit), get_text (this commit). Downstream consumers
(sharding::collect_panes_with_cx from tick 27, any future
workflows/mcp pane-read that threads Cx) can reach the concrete
Cx-first path transparently through the trait dispatch.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib wezterm::: 160/160 pass
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. Next trait-level extensions
can follow the same shape for send_text family, pane lifecycle, and
pane_tiered_scrollback_summary.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
